title: Aspect Ratio
description: Visual mod that allows you to change Minecraft's Aspect Ratio
body:
The AspectRation mod lets you change the screen’s aspect ratio without losing image quality by modifying the projection matrix, not by simply stretching the picture.
It adds the /aspectratio toggle command to enable or disable the feature, as well as /aspectratio change <width> <height> to set a custom aspect ratio.
